2074774391339266071.full_text:
JOFRA ARCHER EXPOSED IPL FLAT PITCHES 🥶

Jofra Archer said 🗣️,

"I guess they’ve been in IPL sometimes. 200 whereas 200 here, especially on that wicket, ‘cause you know it didn’t back as long as some of the other guys. But even with those couple of balls I was in, you know, I felt uncomfortable. So with 200 on the board with that wicket, I don’t want to say confident, but you know, I feel like it would have taken a really special innings there to lose the game. And you know, I’m just glad everybody chipped in. I think everybody that bowl up. Yeah, everybody that bowl up here today. So, you know, just glad to to win.
I think it goes back to normal here. You know, you tread the ball straight and good length, whereas over there, you know, because of the wicket is so easy and the boundaries are so small, like you know, you have to be really, really particular, whereas with here I feel like your margin for error is a little bit bigger."

2074765309425402233.full_text:
🚨SHARDUL THAKUR REVEALS WHAT HAPPENED AFTER A COSTLY NO-BALL AND HOW MS DHONI HANDLE IT 🚨

Shardul Thakur said 🗣️,

"There is no doubt that he gets angry quite a lot. Yes, he is definitely 'Captain Cool', but not when things go wrong on the field. However, he always says one thing: "Everyone will make mistakes." Especially in the T20 format, these ups and downs will continue.
But you have to ask yourself, why are you making the mistake? Is there a problem with your mindset or is there a problem with your planning? If there is a problem with your planning, come and discuss it with me. That has always been his belief, and he gives complete freedom to play. So, he also has the right to get angry.
Interviewer: Yeah.
Shardul Thakur: Okay, fair. And there were two or three games where he got angry at me. Once it was against RCB, when we were playing in Dubai, and I bowled a no-ball to Virat—a wrong ball, a full toss. It wasn't in the plan to bowl a stump yorker, but I went to bowl a stump yorker, and it became a full toss. After the innings ended, I said, "Sorry, my bad, I made a mistake." He was absolutely furious and said, "My premier bowler can't make a mistake like this."
Then he came inside and said, "Listen here, when a mistake happens like that on the ground, you are filled with anger, so don't say anything at that moment. We will discuss it calmly later in the room. I am absolutely cool at that time." So, that is his quality—he gets angry as quickly as he cools down, and he stays calm for a longer time." [Sony Sports Network]

2074724272975827270.full_text:
🚨 MASSIVE STATEMENT BY GAUTAM GAMBHIR AFTER BACK TO BACK LOSS IN T20IS 🚨

Gautam Gambhir said 🗣️,

"When you go to reset a side, sometimes you get such performances. There are a lot of changes from the XI that played the T20 World Cup final to now. Be it the captain, be it the opening batsman. There is no Hardik Pandya, there is no Jasprit Bumrah. When you go for that reset, it takes a bit of time. If you see, a 15-year-old is opening, Prince Yadav is in his second T20I, Harshit Rana is coming back from an injury."
